clips.title: The Room
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, voyeuristic grade. The frame is masked by a keyhole-shaped vignette, black surround, peering through the keyhole into a warmly lamplit room beyond. Through the aperture, a person sits in an armchair reading. A person in a cardigan. Warm interior glow, dark keyhole mask, through-the-keyhole framing, 40mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Study
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, mysterious grade. The frame is masked by a keyhole-shaped vignette, black surround, peering through into a dim study lit by a desk lamp. Through the aperture, a person sits at a desk writing by lamplight. A person in a waistcoat. Warm lamp glow, dark keyhole mask, through-the-keyhole framing, 40mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Ballroom
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, elegant grade. The frame is masked by a keyhole-shaped vignette, black surround, peering through into a grand ballroom glowing with chandeliers. Through the aperture, a person in formal wear turns in a slow dance. A person in an elegant gown or suit. Warm sparkling light, dark keyhole mask, through-the-keyhole framing, 40mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Hall
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. The frame is masked by a keyhole-shaped vignette, black surround, peering through into a dim grand hallway with a chandelier. Through the aperture, a person walks slowly down the hall away from the door. A person in a long coat. Warm dim light, dark keyhole mask, through-the-keyhole framing, 40mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.
